products.name: AmpDrive
products.descriptor: Hybrid-electric propulsion system powering Ampaire's aircraft fleet

evidence.snippet:
Our AmpDrive technology uniquely enables energy optimized planes across all aviation markets by using electric propulsion where it is most impactful.
Ampaire's hybrid electric powertrain accelerates development and certification of subsequent aircrafts using the same or scaled components.

products.name: AMP-H570
products.descriptor: 764 SHP hybrid-electric engine retrofit for regional turboprop aircraft

evidence.snippet:
The AMP-H570 sets a new standard in regional aviation, delivering breakthrough efficiency, reliability, and performance without the high costs typically associated with green technologies.
​
Retrofit to existing aircraft at cost parity with PT6 engines
​
First Hybrid-Electric Engine to achieve FAA G1 certification stage: [Press Release](https://www.ampaire.com/_files/ugd/a0e619_03d4f57e5418465bb3d53ad9397aafd3.pdf)

products.name: Eco Caravan
products.descriptor: Hybrid-electric Cessna Caravan variant for sustainable regional air travel

evidence.snippet:
Eco Caravan
-----------
The future of sustainable air travel. Today.

products.name: Electric EEL
products.descriptor: Hybrid-electric testbed aircraft for short-haul regional flights

evidence.snippet:
Electric EEL.
-------------
Testbed aircraft. Short-haul regional flights. Today.

products.name: Eco Otter
products.descriptor: 1 MW hybrid-electric low-emission variant of the DHC-6 Twin Otter turboprop

evidence.snippet:
Eco Otter
---------
This 1 MW aircraft is a low-emission variant of the workhorse Twin Otter turboprop, used the world over as a regional airliner, cargo hauler and bush plane, as well as in a variety of specialized operations from surveillance to parachute jumping.

Eco Otter
---------
Regional airliner. Specialized Operations. Tomorrow.

products.name: Tailwind™
products.descriptor: Clean-sheet fully-electric aircraft designed for zero-emissions regional travel

evidence.snippet:
Tailwind™.
----------
Revolutionizing travel. Clean-sheet design. Beyond.

unresolved_questions: Eco Caravan and Electric EEL detail pages were not fetched (skipped_class_budget); their readiness and specifications were inferred from the vehicles overview page only.

AmpDrive readiness=production is supported by the homepage paragraph citing 30,000+ miles flown, but that line (resource-0001 L66) exceeded the 60-word citation cap so only the vehicles-page technology description was cited.
No NDAA or Blue UAS claims found anywhere in the corpus for any product.
